dataList.name: Avulsion Wound
dataList.desc:
- Max стаков: 3
- Начало хода: Получает 2 Bleed за каждые стаков
• При макс. стаков, получает +1 Bleed Count
- Конец хода: Получает Bind равный стаков на следующий ход
• При Max стаков, получает 1 Attack Power Down as well на следующий ход
- Конец хода: Если this unit did not получает any Critical Hit this turn, теряет 1 стак

dataList.name: Trussed
dataList.desc:
- Base стаков: 3
- Fix this unit's Speed to 1
- Fix this unit's Базовые скиллы' Coin Power to 0
- Конец хода: Теряет 1 стак
- Если the "Prisoner Transport Arrangements" buff on the inflicter исчезает, this effect исчезает as well
dataList.flavor: Look how the baseborn hunt the other baseborn to serve them up to the powers that be.

dataList.name: Prisoner Transport Arrangements
dataList.desc:
- Base стаков: 1
- Fix this unit's Speed to 1
- Если the Trussed effect this unit inflicted на цели исчезает, или если эта Айдишка погибла или Staggered, теряет this effect
- Если the target this unit inflicted "Trussed" on is defeated this turn, теряет the "Prisoner Transport Arrangements" effect

dataList.name: Headsplitting Memory
dataList.desc:
- Max стаков: 1
- Конец хода: Получает 1 Bind на следующий ход
- Конец хода: Получает (current turn count / 4) Сила клеша Up (округляется вниз, макс. 3)
- Исчезает в конце хода

dataList.name: Intelligence Gathering
dataList.desc:
- Когда using a Skill of identical rank to the Skill photographed, Сила клеша -5
(※ Defense Skills и Э.Г.О Skills are counted separately)
- Исчезает в конце хода

dataList.name: Pinning Nail
dataList.desc:
- Max стаков: 10
- Начало хода: Получает 1 Уровень сваги Down за каждые 2 Bind (макс. 3)
- Начало хода: Получает Bleed равный стаков
- On Tremor Burst, получает Bleed Count равный стаков (один раз за ход)
- Конец хода: Получает Bind равный стаков на следующий ход (макс. 6), then теряет 1 стак

dataList.name: Memory Transition
dataList.desc:
- Base стаков: 3
- Конец хода: Теряет 1 стак. Если у этого юнита есть 0 Stacks of this effect при Turn Start, certain units и effects transform
(когда Staggered, выходит из стаггера)

- Once the above effect activates, reset Memory Transition стаков to Base стаков

dataList.name: Dokkaebi Arms
dataList.desc:
- Base Уровень сваги +4
- Base Уровень жирности +4
- Получает -20% урона
- On Skill Use, получает 1 Haste на следующий ход (2 раз за ход)
- Combat End: получает +2 Poise Count
dataList.flavor:
"... Dokkaebi Arms? Do you, perchance, speak of Dokkaebis that often appear in tales of old? Hmm..."
"I can scarcely believe it, yet after all I have witnessed while relying on the hospitality of Limbus Company, the existence of Dokkaebis from folklore may well be within reason."
"Come to think of it... I do recall hearing of a name called 'Dokkaebi Unit'..."

dataList.name: Mook Workshop - Ye [銳] Type II Bladedraw / Thrust Force: Dokkaebi Fire
dataList.desc:
- Max стаков: 20
- Наносит +1% рубящего урона за каждые стаков (макс. 10%)
- Defense Skills теряет 1 Сила клеша за каждые 2 Stacks (макс. 5)
- Конец хода: Получает 1 Haste на следующий ход за каждые 5 Stacks (макс. 3)
dataList.flavor: "Hm? You like that model? Ooh, new girl's got an eye for quality! Excuse me~! Can we try this model? Oh, c'mon, relax! I know the наносит—'You break it, you buy it.' Thanks! Hehe... See? Told ya I'm a regular here~ Okay, so the sword и the scabbard come as a set, so grab 'em both и feel the weight. How's that? Not as heavy as they look, huh?" "Oho..." "So there's this particle? Powder? Thingy in that scabbard under patent by Mook Workshop! Every time you sheathe и unsheathe the sword, for a brief moment, its blade comes out way sharper и lighter! And that model you're holding happens to focus on the sharpness! So it's like, *Ding!* и voila, you get a nice buff on your weapon!" "I think it's one of the Ye [銳] series models—that's Mook Workshop's classic lineup, by the way. Check out the finish here, it's... What the heck?! Hey, this is the Ye [銳] 'Type II' model that went out of production! You know what, this stuff really isn't easy to come by—we're lucky we found one here!" "Если it's such a rarity, Lady Ezra, perhaps you ought to wield it вместо этого..." "Hnngh... No, it's fine... Well, I can see it's literally made for you! And it'll work real nice with those boosters on your new prosthetic arms. It'll need some getting used to, but you'll be one heck of a fighter once you get the hang of it! Anyway, consider it a gift from yours truly—you're officially one of us now. Officially our new girl! No more temp ID." "Then... I shall accept with gratitude." "By the way... Remember that 'classic lineup' part? It's super durable, but there are delicate parts that you should watch out not to break—okay, you know what, let 'em break если it really comes to that. Just..." "Just don't die on us." "... I shall получает your words to heart."

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal]
dataList.desc: - Min стаков 1; Max стаков 9 - On Skill Use, при Min или Max Stacks, convert all Coins this unit uses to Unbreakable Coins - Skill Базовая сила и Coin Power shift based on стаков · 1 ~ 2 стака: Базовая сила -6, Сила монет +4 · 3 ~ 4 стака: Базовая сила -3, Сила монет +2 · 5 стаков: No effect · 6 ~ 7 стаков: Базовая сила +4, Coin Power -2 · 8 ~ 9: Базовая сила +8, Coin Power -3

dataList.name: Battleform of the Homeland - Bearhunt
dataList.desc: Use a pattern made of single-coin Skills Im Gyeong-eop gains advantage при higher Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] стаков
dataList.flavor:
The mountains of S Corp.'s District 19 are home to all manner of beasts.
Amongst them, the bear, in particular, boasts strength и force akin to boulders falling from the cliff in a landslide. Giving ground to the creature's charge is ill-advised—one must aim to hew it down with the first slash of the blade.

dataList.name: Battleform of the Homeland - Tigerhunt
dataList.desc: Use a pattern made of multi-coin Skills Im Gyeong-eop gains advantage при lower Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] стаков
dataList.flavor:
Tigers are cunning и ferocious.
One cannot hope to cut through a tiger's flesh with a single stroke. Only a relentless flurry of chained slashes can overwhelm the creature until it is felled при last.
Fail to do so, и the tiger will escape death—или best its opponent to one day grow в a Sangun, a Lord of the Mountain.
Whether these beings will grant auspicious fortune on men или return as malevolent calamity is impossible to tell.

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal]
dataList.desc: - Max стаков: 5 - Когда gaining this effect, получает Shield равный 10% of this unit's макс. ХП за каждые стаков (min 1, округляется вниз; Shield gained due to this effect не expire в конце хода) - Начало столкновения: Получает 1 Уровень жирности Down за каждые 2 стака (rounded up) - Наносит +(стаков x 2.5)% рубящего урона - Теряет 1 стак когда taking Shield урон равный 10% of this unit's макс. ХП

dataList.name: Dimensional Bag - Namir Workshop
dataList.desc:
Draws the next Workshop weapon from the Dimensional Bag
- Current Workshop weapon: Namir Workshop Gauntlets

dataList.flavor: "Now this one's got G Corp.'s Singularity baked in—the Sphere! Here's how it works: You float up, pop the switch midair, и crush down with the weight of the gravity. Land a solid hit, и it's gonna be... brutal."
